title: Enhanced Tooltips
description: Client-side Minecraft mod that improves tooltips for tools, armor, enchantments and food. Fully configurable!
body:
# Enhanced Tooltips Enhanced Tooltips improves Minecraft item tooltips by adding useful information that normally isn’t shown, while keeping the vanilla style. The mod adds detailed information for enchantments, tools, armor, and food, and everything can be configured in-game. ✨ Client-side only – safe to use on any server. 🌎 Supports 14 Languages
🌎 Supported Languages - English
- Czech
- German
- Spanish
- Finish
- French
- Italian
- Korean
- Polish
- Russian
- Slovakian
- Turkish
- Ukrainian
- Mandarin
*** ## ➕ New Tooltips 1. **Enchantments** Shows descriptions for enchantments 2. **Tools** Shows **Durability, Mining Speed, and Enchantability** 3. **Armor** Shows **Armor Protection, Toughness, and Knockback Resistance** 4. **Food** Shows **Nutrition, Saturation, and Effects (if any)** *** ## ⚙️ In-Game Configuration This mod includes a **built-in GUI config menu**. Open it using the command: `/enhancedtooltips` Aliases: * `/tooltips` * `/tooltip`
⚙️ Configurable Features - Every new Tooltip can be toggled ON/OFF
- Custom Colors for Nutrition and Saturation Tooltips
*** ![Netherite Sword Tooltip](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_404b39a9-6ff5-4ac4-a024-f71fd0416326.png) ![Ench. Gapple Tooltip](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_eb6f260c-0d4c-4fde-aa9f-2070f0c14492.png)
